steps.title: Use the allow pattern
steps.content: After allows researchers, Standard English uses the pattern allow someone to do something. The blank must therefore complete an infinitive phrase.

steps.title: Reject broken verb forms
steps.content: Choice B inserts a finite verb where an infinitive is needed. Choice C creates a relative clause that leaves the main construction incomplete. Choice D uses a participial form that does not fit allows researchers. The infinitive form completes the sentence correctly. The answer is A.
